options.content:
# VAST Audit Log — Overview
Real-time view of all file system activity across the VAST cluster. Use the navigation links above to drill into specific dashboards.

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT count(*)
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)))
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT path.path)
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')

SELECT sum(num_bytes) as "bytes"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT')

SELECT sum(num_bytes) as "bytes"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND not rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT')

SELECT sum(num_bytes) as "bytes"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')

SELECT client_ip AS "Client IP",
       IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) AS "User",
       protocol AS "Protocol",
       rpc_type AS "RPC Type",
       path.path AS "Filename",
       to_iso8601(time) AS "Time",
       status AS "Status",
       num_bytes AS "Size",
       num_ops AS "Operations",
       cluster_name AS "Cluster Name"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY client_ip,
         IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)),
         protocol, rpc_type, path.path, to_iso8601(time),
         status, num_bytes, num_ops, cluster_name
LIMIT 1000

SELECT protocol, count(*) as count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY protocol
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) AS user,
       COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR))
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT rpc_type AS rpc_type,
       COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY rpc_type
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT element_at(split(path.path, '.'), -1) as "Extension",
       sum(num_bytes) as "bytes"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT')
  AND strpos(path.path, '.') > 0
  AND num_bytes > 0
GROUP BY element_at(split(path.path, '.'), -1)
ORDER BY sum(num_bytes) DESC

SELECT IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) AS user_name,
       COUNT(*) AS ops
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR))
ORDER BY ops DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT element_at(split(path.path, '/'), -2) AS directory,
       COUNT(*) AS ops
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY element_at(split(path.path, '/'), -2)
ORDER BY ops DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT to_iso8601(time) AS "Time",
       rpc_type AS "Operation",
       protocol AS "Protocol",
       path.path AS "Path",
       IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) AS "User",
       client_ip AS "Client IP",
       num_bytes AS "Size",
       status AS "Status"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND rpc_type IN ('DELETE', 'RENAME', 'REMOVE', 'UNLINK')
GROUP BY time, rpc_type, protocol, path.path, login_name, uid, client_ip, num_bytes, status
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Cross-Protocol File Access (Files Accessed via Multiple Protocols)

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT path.path AS "File Path",
       COUNT(DISTINCT protocol) AS "Protocol Count",
       ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT protocol), ', ') AS "Protocols",
       COUNT(*) AS "Total Ops",
       COUNT(DISTINCT IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR))) AS "Users",
       COALESCE(SUM(num_bytes), 0) AS "Total Bytes"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
GROUP BY path.path
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT protocol) > 1
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT protocol) DESC, COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 50

list.description: Optional directory prefix to filter by
list.label: Filename Prefix
list.name: dir_prefix

list.description: Filter by user login name prefix
list.label: User Prefix
list.name: user_prefix

list.description: Filter by action/RPC type prefix (e.g. CREATE, WRITE, DELETE)
list.label: Action Prefix
list.name: action_prefix
